name: root_out_of_scope_query
query: What is the capital of France?
reference: I'm sorry, I can only answer questions related to the City of Ottawa.
description: Root agent should reject clearly out-of-scope queries.

name: root_happy_path_query
query: What is the pavement condition rating of the road segment on Baseline Road?
reference: The pavement condition rating for the segment on Baseline Road is 3.Fair
description: Root agent should handle another in-scope query with appropriate retrieval and response.
